relationships.context: V interacts with Vibe Debugger for testing
V requests Vibe Builder to fix the bug
Vibe Debugger uses Worker 6 for report
Worker 6 is associated with CRM v3
Vibe Debugger tests profiles created via CLI
CLI uses YAML files to define category parameters
